revision.comment: Updated (a touch boldly) based on discussion on talk; sets legend-color size and line-height to 1.25 em, makes width minimum, not fixed, and removes font-size
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
Updated (a touch boldly) based on discussion on talk; sets legend-color size and line-height to 1.25 em, makes width minimum, not fixed, and removes font-size
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]
